payload.expression: SELECT count(*)::int AS n FROM items WHERE parent_id = {{params.self}} AND type_id = '0c8a7b10-1111-4a00-8000-000000000102' AND deleted_at IS NULL

params.name: self
params.description: The ch-message row's item id (bound from the row).

payload.description: ch-message.replyCount — count of non-deleted child ch-message items (one-level replies).
